name: "AY GIMME THE HOTDOG!" - Hotdog
description:
"alright! Right in the middle! Go on dawg!" - Banana

"Nah... Cus I think you got more than me bruh..." - Hotdog

"Duuuuuude. That hedgehog we met literally told me you'd say that!" - Taunt

"Really?" - Hotdog

"No, but he did say you were FAT. YOU FATTY!" - Cloak

I'm thinking of making an adrenaline bot soon! But... I can't really find any good renders or art for him... Yes, there's actually a bit of lore in this one.
creator: TheYangReaper
